summary: Resume Live Game after broadcast start milestone
description:
GIVEN a user who is entitled for Live game playback is logged in

AND the user is on the Games page

AND the user selects a Live pregame for playback

AND the user exits Live pregame playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the same Live game after the first inning has started

AND selects the same team feed for Resume playback
steps.result:
THEN the Games page is dismissed

AND the video player displays full screen

AND playback starts successfully from the resumed point
